title: YTPLS: The Hot Rocks Polka
description:
The universes collide as all the major YTP characters come together to sing Weird Al's Hot Rocks Polka.

This is my 3rd (full) poop with Weird Al material. This is my always-th poop with AIDS material. I still like it.

Took me a while to sync the words to appropriate poop scenes, but I did it. Weeeee!
